products.title: The Happy Cord Charm Necklace
products.body_html:
our happy cords are here to stay

the perfect medium for adding charms and telling stories,

the charms open and close so you can add and subtract at will.

each piece a memory,  each charm a moment, make it yours

Choose 1, 2, or 3 charms to make the perfect necklace. The charms open and close so you can add and subtract accordingly.
